tools.name: turboquant_vector_search
tools.title: TurboQuant Vector Search
tools.description: Search for nearest neighbors in compressed vector database

tools.name: turboquant_cost_analyze
tools.title: TurboQuant Cost Analyze
tools.description: Analyze Claude Code usage snapshots and compute cache efficiency metrics

tools.name: turboquant_cache_plan
tools.title: TurboQuant Cache Plan
tools.description: Classify context blocks by volatility and recommend cache tiers

tools.name: turboquant_prompt_cache_lint
tools.title: TurboQuant Prompt Cache Lint
tools.description: Detect cache-busting patterns in context blocks

tools.name: turboquant_context_pack_build
tools.title: TurboQuant Context Pack Build
tools.description: Build a compressed context pack from files for local retrieval

tools.name: turboquant_context_pack_search
tools.title: TurboQuant Context Pack Search
tools.description: Search a context pack for relevant chunks

tools.name: turboquant_cli_mcp_profile
tools.title: TurboQuant CLI MCP Profile
tools.description: Return MCP client profile for a given host: config snippet, transport, smoke command, support status. Hosts: generic_stdio, claude_code, codex_cli, cursor, gemini_cli, opencode, crush.

tools.name: turboquant_quantize
tools.title: TurboQuant Quantize
tools.description: TurboQuant codebook computation, vector quantization, and MSE benchmarking. Uses paper-faithful Beta PDF + Lloyd-Max algorithm.

tools.name: turboquant_kv_analyze
tools.title: TurboQuant KV Analyze
tools.description: Analyze KV cache compression savings and recommend TurboQuant configuration for a given model architecture and memory budget.

memoryBudgetMb.description: Target memory budget in MB (for recommend_config)

tools.name: turboquant_backend_probe
tools.title: TurboQuant Backend Probe
tools.description: Detect available TurboQuant backends. Quick mode (default) is Termux-safe and never imports torch/triton/vLLM. Pass deep=true for full check.

deep.description: If true, attempt bounded Python imports for torch/triton/vLLM. Default false.

tools.name: turboquant_opencl_probe
tools.title: TurboQuant OpenCL Probe
tools.description: Probe OpenCL availability on this device. Detects Adreno GPU, library paths, and capabilities. Use deep=true for full clinfo device enumeration.

deep.description: Run clinfo for full device details (slower)

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for deep probe in ms (100-5000)

tools.name: turboquant_adreno_loader_probe
tools.title: TurboQuant Adreno Loader Probe
tools.description: Diagnose Android linker namespace state for vendor OpenCL. Reports whether libOpenCL.so exists, is loadable, or is blocked by namespace isolation. Includes device/SoC info when available.
